title:
'Telling our open data stories' engagement
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## 'Telling our open data stories' engagement
The sharing of open data stories raises awareness about open data and encourages new release and use. In 2017 Stats NZ commissioned engage2 to gather stories from current and potential users of open data. Here you can read the report from that engagement.
- Engagement Summary - Open Data Programme 2017 (PDF, 600 KB)
